understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through KA59’s levels by placing all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked ‘+’ in the semantic grid; when multiple ‘+’ exist, every goal must be occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN, and completing the final WIN ends the whole run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each action moves the currently selected piece one grid step (in 3-pixel cell units) using MOVE_*; movement can be blocked or altered by walls/boundaries, and adjacent pushable blocks can be pushed if directly in the move direction. Levels may contain multiple selectable pieces; control is switched via CLICK on a selectable’s exact pixel/grid position from the state, not semantic cell indices. The movement_*_blocked flags act only as hints about nearby objects and don’t guarantee success or failure.
